name: Orbis Fatum
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Astral Reign - Ch. 5 - Fated Theater
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Shield and +[Arg2]% Temporary DMG Amplification. If Arachne is in the party, draw 1 {Eternal Loom} and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1.
lore:
Spin, measure, sever.
The goddess of destiny knows neither joy nor sorrow; the wheel of fate turns for all eternity.
